programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: Dutchess spends her last days in NYC attempting to make amends with Donna. Kathie calls on her spirit guides to help her get revenge on O'Sh*t. Sky's past comes back to haunt her just as she's starting a new chapter in her life.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.desc: The crew heads north for some snow-tubing fun. O'Sh*t gets a grim warning from his doctor. Donna must make a decision about Max. Ceaser celebrates the new shop and O'Sh*t makes a decision that will change Black Ink forever.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez respond to a call that their psychic friend, Maggie Gibson, has been stabbed.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate a series of violent robberies targeting luxury timepieces, and Erin is conflicted about criminally charging a potentially innocent man.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank launches an investigation after the Reagan family is harassed when protests against a controversial NYPD unit escalate. Also, Danny and Baez form an unlikely partnership with an informant in order to prevent a murder.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Jamie clash over a gang-related shooting after Jamie oversteps as part of his new position and Danny empathizes too closely with a victim.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin and Anthony clash when Anthony's daughter, Sophia (Isabel Harper Leight), is the sole eyewitness to a fatal shooting.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny crosses paths with Sonny Le (Alex Duong), a criminal from a previous case, when he investigates a gang attack with a shocking motive.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Reagan family tensions run high when Frank and his grandson, Joe Hill (Will Hochman), contend with a grievous insult to the memory of Joe's father, Joe Reagan.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie and his new intel team officer infiltrate a high-tech car smuggling ring. Also, Frank faces off against the city's transit chief over a new mayoral solo police patrol program that is causing officer injuries on the job.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez's investigation into the death of a chess hustler is complicated by interference from the victim's son. Also, Erin is offered an endorsement of her run for D.A. by an influential Harlem pastor in exchange for a professional favor.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny reunites with Mickey Patrick (Tom Cavanagh), his childhood friend and a former criminal, who comes to him for help finding his missing fiancée. Also, Anthony surprises Erin with one last stakeout before her run for district attorney.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez race against the clock to catch a serial killer targeting young women across the city. Also, Erin and Eddie clash when Eddie intervenes in a case and Erin's personal life.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: The return of Rachel Witten (Lauren Patten), Eddie's former partner turned social worker, tests her loyalties and conflicts Frank, when Rachel brings an accusation of excessive force against an officer.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny partners with Texas Ranger Waylon Gates (Lyle Lovett) again to deliver an infamous drug cartel boss to arraignment, but the mission becomes complicated when the criminal threatens to harm the Reagans.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben assists Georgio Rossi in his battle for water on adjoining property.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights' cousin, Clarissa visits. Her assertive, snobbish ways result in nothing but trouble for Ben and his sons.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is conned into buying a violin from a gypsy fortune teller, and everyone on the Ponderosa--except for Hop Sing--suffers the consequences.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Civil War once again divides the citizens of Nevada, as well as Adam and Joe Cartwright. One of season four's highlights, the plot involving British spy Bill Stewart, based on historical fact.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Billy Horne is a white man who was captured by the Shoshone when he was six. He comes into Ben & Joe's campsite one night uninvited.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben helps Matthew Raine, a famous painter who has gone blind and now wallows in self-pity, discover a new purpose in life. However, Raine's employee Gavin has other ideas.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Determined to prove he can succeed at something without the help of his Pa, Hoss, and Adam, Joe sets out on his quest and wins a timber contract for Ponderosa timber, and later discovers that having a family to rely on can definitely be an asset.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An Indian-hating officer, Colonel Edward J. Dunwoody, comes to the Ponderosa looking for army deserter Bill Winters, who is a good friend of the Cartwrights.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is jailed for robbing the bank in Dutchman Flats, a town on the brink of economic collapse, even the sheriff knows he is innocent, but a lynch mob gathers and Hoss' fate is not good.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Clay Stafford signs on to work for the Cartwrights and shortly afterwards shoots and kills a man who accuses him of cheating at poker. The miners warn Clay to leave town, but it appears he killed in self-defense.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Hoss is responsible for causing a hung jury, Ben tells him, "a man is never wrong doing what he thinks is right", and Adam attempts to validate his brother's reasonable doubt.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Ponderosa becomes a war zone when it is invaded by a detachment of Mexican mercenaries under General Diaz.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss volunteers to pickup an injured neighbor's mail-order bride, but by the time they return, she has fallen in love with Hoss and a price is put on Hoss' head.

programme.desc: As Naruto sleeps, Kawaki repairs the vase he broke. Suddenly, Kurama, the Nine-Tailed Beast, appears before him.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: Using the Transportation Technique, Sasuke arrives at a strange location that is covered with mysterious inscriptions. There he finds many surprising things about the Otsutsuki Clan.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: A direct confrontation between Naruto, the Seventh Hokage, and Jigen, the leader of the Kara, finally begins!

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: Naruto and Sasuke work together to defeat Jigen in a fierce battle, but they struggle against Jigen's advanced fighting abilities and mysterious jutsu.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: With the enemy's sudden appearance, Naruto, the Seventh Hokage and leader of the village, has vanished.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: Boruto and the others attack Boro to save Naruto, but Boro drives them back by releasing a mysterious dark mist that paralyses his opponents.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: The newly formed Team 7's all-out attack damages Boro, and their efforts seem to be successful. However, Boro uses his regenerative powers to revive himself.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: Despite sustaining serious damage from the new Team 7, Boro goes on a mad rampage, threatening Boruto and the others with total annihilation.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: In order to learn more about Boro’s connection to Kara, Konohamaru and Sai are tasked with a mission to infiltrate Boro's cult.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: Someone has stolen data about the Leaf Ninja, and it’s suspected a spy may have been planted inside the village.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: In exchange for being granted asylum in the Village Hidden in the Leaves, Amado reveals everything he knows.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: The battle between Koji Kashin and Jigen begins at Kara’s hideout.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: Boruto pulls Isshiki into another dimension for a final showdown.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: Naruto and Sasuke fight fiercely, but their efforts are in vain as Isshiki drives them into a corner.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: Momoshiki has taken control of Boruto’s consciousness and stands before them as an enemy.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
programme.desc: Amado provides some new information concerning Code, whose powers surpass Jigen.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es asesinada en su apartamento, Danny y Báez recurren a su hija, Margo, para pedir ayuda, pero en cambio ella complica la investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a San Francisco cuando una serie de asesinatos lleva a creer que El asesino del Zodíaco podría haber regresado. Mientras tanto, Reid reflexiona si podría hacer algo más con sus habilidades de genio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo es llamado para buscar a un violador en serie de Houston conocido como El pianista, que ha vuelto y está atacando a sus víctimas anteriores. Por otra parte, Prentiss comienza un tratamiento por la experiencia traumática causada por Ian Doyle.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Los agentes de la UAC prueban su suerte en Atlantic City, cuando el equipo es llamado para investigar una serie de asesinatos ritualistas relacionados con el casino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige a las playas de California tras la aparición de varios cadáveres en torres de salvamento en la costa. Deberán averiguar que tienen los cuerpos en común y quién ha podido hacerlo. Por otro lado, Hotch invita a Beth a salir.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando Ducky y Abby confirman que han identificado los restos de al menos cinco personas, el equipo de NCIS comienza inmediatamente a notificar a sus familias, con la intención de encontrar una conexión entre la azarosa selección de víctimas.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga cuando un Marine que aparentaba haber muerto congelado despierta en la mesa de autopsia de Ducky.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan cuando una llamada en el fin de semana resulta en la muerte de dos agentes del NCIS. El equipo descubre que la información obtenida sobre actividad terrorista era una trampa para asesinarlos.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan cuando el libro de Mcgee sobre un agente de la NCIS se convierte en realidad. McGee se horroriza cuando un contramaestre en el que basó al personaje de su libro es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Danny pide ayuda a su archienemigo encarcelado, Victor Lugo (Nick Cordero), para localizar a un criminal peligroso que escapó de prisión, Lugo acepta colaborar solo si puede unirse a la búsqueda.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una empresa de rastreo de datos cuando se niegan a desbloquear el teléfono de un terrorista que podría tener información sobre próximos objetivos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, tras una serie de tiroteos mortales después de que seis hombres injustamente condenados fueran liberados, Danny y Baez se preguntan si los asesinatos fueron parte de un plan de venganza de los exconvictos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Los agentes de la UAC prueban su suerte en Atlantic City, cuando el equipo es llamado para investigar una serie de asesinatos ritualistas relacionados con el casino.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers tackle a man carrying other people's credit cards, two women deny ownership of drug paraphernalia found in their bags, and police mediate a father-son dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife resists as a hotel clerk cheers on Officers. A man protests the legality of a stop but finally admits why he argued with Officers. A passenger becomes emotional when meth is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A handcuffed passenger surprises Officers by running from a traffic stop. A fleeing SUV runs out of gas shortly after a pursuit is terminated. A man claims guns were planted in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers split up to interrogate two men suspected of stealing a pick-up truck, a motorist tries to ditch a bag of meth, and police discover a bunch of syringes in a vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a bike refuses to stop and tries to hide a drug-filled backpack. A motorcyclist's attempt to flee is foiled by a big rig blocking the road. Meth is found in a center console during a stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police chase a man running away from his car and a warrant, a driver is just as unlicensed as his vehicle, and a domestic violence call involves two lovers and a hammer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control driver wants to get home for his child's birthday, officers respond to a suspected shooting, and a trip to buy dog food turns into a run-in with the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in tire slashing. Suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sluggish suspect attempts to outrun the police, officers try to piece together a wild fight between neighbors, and a man's plot to extort money from an ex goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to ditch his stash in a laundromat, a nervous driver arouses suspicion, and a woman returning home from a night out finds her boyfriend has changed the locks.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip, and a frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies but takes the wrong approach.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man about to go on trial for arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building, killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a single human bone is discovered in the desert, Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of the skeleton.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una noche febril en Las Vegas se salda con un hombre muerto con un traje de alienígena, otro hombre muerto en una bañera, una mujer muerta con dos hombres sospechosos en la escena del crimen y otro hombre muerto con una polaroid de otro hombre muerto.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Las fuertes lluvias en Las Vegas arrastran un cadáver por las alcantarillas. Mientras el equipo investiga, encuentran huesos en el alcantarillado que solo podrían ser de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una niña es secuestrada en el exterior de una tienda de comestibles, lo que desencadena una alerta Amber.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una mujer aparece muerta en la suite de un hotel con síntomas del virus del ébola.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara investigan el asesinato de una mujer tras una fiesta de intercambio en la que los matrimonios del barrio se reúnen y cambian de pareja.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de miembros de una fraternidad encuentra un lugar cubierto de gusanos, Grissom investiga la escena y cree que un estudiante está proporcionando la carne a los gusanos.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom es llamado por el asesinato de una joven de 17 años en el ático de un casino. Todo el equipo se ve involucrado cuando se descubre que se ha producido un secuestro junto con el asesinato.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una mujer que había sido detenida por la policía aparece asesinada a tres kilómetros de la parada. No pasa mucho tiempo antes de que Robbins determine que la mujer, genéticamente hablando, no es una mujer.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom se enfrenta a nuevas pruebas mientras está en el estrado de un juicio por asesinato del dueño de un restaurante.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Descubren que el niño tiene hermanos que también están en peligro.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Greg, para su competencia final, tiene que determinar cómo fue asesinado el Sherlock Holmes de un club de Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Warrick investiga el asesinato de un hombre por alguien que aparentemente necesita una silla de ruedas. Nick investiga el asesinato de una mujer en la subcultura del narcocorrido, canciones sobre asesinatos relacionados con las drogas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick y Nick encuentran el cadáver de dos mujeres en unas obras enterradas bajo el alquitrán.El turno de swing se adentra en el mundo de las novias extranjeras por correo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofía, Sara y Greg investigan la desaparición de una mujer que volvía a casa tras una noche de fiesta con una amiga después de que su coche abandonado aparezca en el arcén de una autopista.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a robbery/homicide leaves two men dead and a third still alive, Horatio is determined to find out what really happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton is trying to drive out of the hurricane's fury when he kills a man in the blinding storm and is now accused of vehicular manslaughter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A gas man is engulfed in invisible flames and dies all of which happens during a qualifying race at the Grand Prix Americas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finally closes the case of his brother's murder. He is reunited with Suzie, a former drug user who was involved with his brother.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a woman is witnessed being attacked by a shark, the CSIs learn that she was murdered prior to being dumped in the water.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young woman is thrown over the railing of a parking garage, the investigation into her death uncovers evidence that she was killed before the fall.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a plastic surgery anesthesiologist is found dead from an apparent suicide, Horatio thinks that this could be a case of murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A diamond broker is shot to death in a parking garage, a mentally disabled man witnessed the murder and wants to help Horatio solve the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man, Juan Marco Varon, who may or may not have tortured Cuban refuges is murdered, the CSIs are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and his team delve into the world of celebrity and investigate the murder of a paparazzi. He discovers the victim witnessed another murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson is killed in his own home and his body is missing, while his wife and son are left alive, but beaten and bound.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In the Everglades, near a controlled burn, Alexx and Delko search the crime scene. They are forced to take cover when a wall of fire overtakes them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio is quick to arrive on the scene when an armored truck carrying 3.2 million dollars is robbed in a daring downtown heist.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin literally becomes part of a murder crime scene after he steals a latex glove to add to his personal forensic collection.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI tiene dificultades para encontrar al asesino de un infame narcotraficante y Asuntos Internos investiga a un miembro del equipo por drogas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un violador es brutalmente asesinado después de que se expone su identidad. Llaman a Horatio y al equipo de CSI para investigar el asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan a un grupo de artistas de seducción masculinos que buscan conquistas cuando uno de ellos aparece muerto inesperadamente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El Festival Latino de Miami pasa del samba a las tinieblas cuando una pista de baile llena se convierte en el escenario de un pandillero. Horatio y el equipo investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un extraño asesinato del dueño de un club de South Beach resulta ser un guión en el que el arte imita a la vida. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Walter Resden, el criminal archienemigo de Horatio desde hace mucho tiempo, sale a la superficie una vez más y Caine está decidido a finalmente llevarlo ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Alex hace campaña contra un delincuente sexual que se muda a su vecindario y se ve envuelto en una controversia cuando asesinan al hombre poco tiempo después.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Lo que comienza como un caso de aparente violencia al volante lleva al equipo de CSI a la investigación de un collar robado de cuatro millones de dólares, que está vinculado a un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un supremacista blanco es absuelto por el asesinato de su esposa después de enterarse de que ella es mestiza, depende de Horatio hundir al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una banda de pistoleros enmascarados invade un spa exclusivo, con los lujosos autos de las clientas como botín. Un cliente se hiere en la pelea.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Los cuerpos de dos hombres, ejecutados a tiros, son descubiertos en un hotel abandonado programado para ser demolido. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una llamada de teléfono celular lleva al equipo a investigar un secuestro que, a menos que lleguen a la víctima antes de que sea demasiado tarde, pronto podría convertirse en un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Encuentran electrocutada en su bañera durante una fiesta a una joven heredera ultraglamurosa y querida de los medios, y no faltan sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Mientras investiga la desaparición de un pasajero de un crucero, el equipo descubre que también ha ocurrido un asesinato en el barco.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a string of murders in New York that revolve around an online world, apparently performed by a hit man.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate two eerie murders on Halloween; one, an apparent zombie attack, the other a faked murder/suicide in a house with a spooky past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team works to solve two seemingly unrelated murders that after investigations are underway turn out to be connected.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates crimes: one involving a model that was killed on a billboard in Times Square, and another centered around a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a groom on his wedding day and the appearance of a mysterious box on the hood of Stella’s car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac travels to Chicago in order to solve the mystery of the 333 caller while the rest of the CSI team works on a murder in a subway car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a wealthy man in a hip nightclub and the inadvertent shooting of a young boy during a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of the owner of a posh hotel as well as the death of a teenager that seems to be connected to Peter Pan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a young woman and a prominent judge are murdered, the CSI team works to discover the connection between the two crimes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a street luger and the mysterious drowning of a woman in a self-sanitizing pay bathroom.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a trained female assassin comes to New York City, she really puts the CSI New York team members’ abilities to the test.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a little girl and a fire set to her apartment building leaves CSI New York team member Stella feeling guilty and homeless.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A shark washes up on shore unloading a dead body and a bizarre crime scene that leaves the CSI New York team more than puzzled.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A high school dance is interrupted by the killing of the school’s guidance counselor. Meanwhile, the taxi cab serial killer is still on the loose.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Presa (S5 Ep20)
programme.desc: Mientras investiga la muerte a tiros de un hombre en un teatro vacío, Stella se da cuenta de que la escena del crimen es extrañamente familiar y planeada.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Pasado, presente y homicidio (S5 Ep21)
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre muere al caer del piso 52 y su cuerpo desaparece después de tocar el suelo, el equipo de CSI debe tratar este caso como la desaparición de una persona.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Aniversario luctuoso (S5 Ep22)
programme.desc: La subasta de joyas más exclusiva del año termina abruptamente cuando asesinan a un tasador durante el evento. Hay un cambio emocional en la investigación.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Un bien mayor (S5 Ep23)
programme.desc: Mac le informa a un ex convicto que cumplió condena por un crimen que no cometió y Anna le dice a Danny que es hora de que nazca el primer bebé del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: La verdad me engaña (S5 Ep24)
programme.desc: Stella descubre que los neoyorquinos están siendo asesinados por artefactos griegos antiguos, ella entrega su placa para seguir una pista que la lleva a Grecia.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Págale (S5 Ep25)
programme.desc: Al trasladar al hijo de Robert Dunbrook de la cárcel al tribunal, un grupo de secuestradores profesionales embosca a la policía de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Epílogo (S6 Ep 1)
programme.desc: La vida de un miembro del equipo de CSI de Nueva York cambia para siempre de manera significativa después de un tiroteo.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Lista negra (Presentando al sepulturero) (S6 Ep 2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York está rastreando a un asesino cibernético que actualmente amenaza la vida de varios trabajadores de la salud.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El asesino de la soga (S6 Ep 3)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Juana padece la enfermedad de Cupido, siente una gran felicidad, ganas de vivir, tener sexo y salir con jóvenes. Por otro lado, Claudia publicó en internet el acoso sexual de su jefe.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: La renovación del estatus migratorio de Tony fue negada y será deportado. Por otro lado, Mia y Frankel son soldados y pasan por un estrés emocional que afecta la relación de pareja.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Giovani es amanerado, todos piensan que es gay, incluso su propia familia, pero él lo niega. También, Juan es profesor de música y le regaló un iPhone a su alumna para espiarla.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Patricia es transexual y trabaja como actriz porno, pero no a cambio de dinero. Por otro lado, Rossi es una joven que tiene problemas de conducta y Gladis la secuestra para corregirla.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Edwin y Érica se pelean la custodia de una hija con un temperamento muy fuerte. Eduardo dejó a su hermano en México, años después se lo encuentra en Miami con otro género.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Tony y Welinton buscaron a Anthony por su imagen, pero la realidad era otra. Además, Alba quiere que su esposo Tomás fabrique muñecas sin cabello, él piensa que no es buen negocio.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Lola obliga a su esposo Rocco a inyectarse esteroides para tener mejor desempeño físico y sexual. Además, Ángela descubrió que una alumna está siendo abusada por un familiar.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Sonia trajo de Cuba a su novio Pedro para casarse con él, pero en la despedida de soltera tiene sexo con un stripper. El hijo de María murió ahogado con una de las piezas de un Fidget Spinner.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Las estafadoras

programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: Fuerzas de la naturaleza
programme.desc: Ben está intentando llegar a Savannah para su boda. Una gaviota vuela hacia el motor de su avión cuando está despegando. Todos los vuelos más tarde se cancelan por un huracán, entonces hace dedo y lo lleva una atractiva mujer llamada Sara.

programme.title: El curioso caso de Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Cartas a Julieta
programme.desc: Mientras está de vacaciones en Verona, Sophie se encuentra con una carta a Julieta y se embarca en una misión para encontrar a su autor.

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: Ruta 666
programme.desc: Route 666 is the thrilling story of a Federal agent whose pursuit of an escaped witness brings him directly in contact with a highway haunted by a treacherous past.

programme.title: Star Trek II: la ira de Khan
programme.desc: Es el siglo XXIII. La Federación Unida de Planetas Enterprise está haciendo maniobras de entrenamiento de rutina, y el almirante James T. Kirk parece resignado al hecho de que esta inspección puede ser la última misión espacial de su carrera.

programme.title: Hasta que llegó su hora
programme.desc: La historia épica de un misterioso desconocido con una armónica que se une a un conocido forajido para proteger a una hermosa viuda de un asesino despiadado que trabaja para el ferrocarril.

programme.title: La gran pelea
programme.desc: Cuando el campeón mundial de peso pesado es enviado a la cárcel, todo apunta a un inevitable enfrentamiento con el invicto campeón de la prisión.

programme.title: Cuatro hermanos
programme.desc: Unos hermanos muy diferentes entre sí (Mark Wahlberg, Tyrese Gibson, André Benjamin) se reúnen para vengarse tras enterarse del asesinato de su madre adoptiva.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis exmilitares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Star Trek: sin límites
programme.desc: En una misión de rescate, el USS Enterprise es atacado por Krall, un caudillo militar que ha jurado destruir a la Federación. Estrelló en un mundo desconocido, la tripulación debe unir fuerzas con Jaylah, una guerrera alienígena, para detener Krall.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico sólo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narco.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis exmilitares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza
programme.desc: En este mordaz thriller policíaco, un policía desacreditado que busca al asesino de su compañero descubre accidentalmente una conspiración gubernamental vinculada al asesinato de una mujer con un coche bomba.

programme.title: El gran asalto
programme.desc: En una patrulla, un policía veterano y su compañero quedan atrapados con un pasajero en un enfrentamiento con exmercenarios que roban un banco.

programme.title: Hombres de élite
programme.desc: En este tenso thriller protagonizado por John Travolta y Kate Bosworth, un equipo de trabajadores de líneas eléctricas de Texas se apresura a instalar kilómetros de cable antes de que una mortal tormenta eléctrica destruya la red eléctrica.

programme.title: Devotion: Una historia de héroes
programme.desc: Jonathan Majors (Creed III) y Glen Powell (Top Gun: Maverick) protagonizan esta épica e inspiradora historia real sobre dos pilotos de caza de élite estadounidenses durante la Guerra de Corea.

programme.title: Tortugas Ninja 2: fuera de las sombras
programme.desc: Las tortugas vuelven para pelear contra más villanos junto a su nuevo aliado Casey Jones. Cuando escapa el supervillano Shredder con su plan de conquistar al mundo, los hermanos se preparan para vencerlo.

programme.title: Condorito: la película
programme.desc: ¡La más amada tira cómica cobra vida en una hilarante aventura de otro planeta para toda la familia!

programme.title: Jugando con fuego
programme.desc: Cuando el bombero Jake Carson (John Cena) y su equipo (Keegan-Michael Key y John Leguizamo) rescatan a tres hermanos que se encontraban en la trayectoria de un incendio forestal.

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: Las tortugas ninja
programme.desc: Las tortugas ninja están mejor que nunca en este éxito de taquilla cargado de acción y risas imparables. Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York está en problemas, le corresponde salvarla a estos cuatro hermanos ninja, amantes de la pizza.

programme.title: Tortugas Ninja 2: fuera de las sombras

programme.title: Bob Esponja, la película
programme.desc: Él es la loca estrella submarina de un océano lleno de aventuras, él es Bob Esponja en su debut en la película original!

programme.title: Una guerra de película
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black y Robert Downey Jr. encabezan un reparto singular en 'Una Guerra de Película', una comedia de acción sobre un grupo de actores que se disponen a realizar la película de guerra más cara.

programme.title: Enchufe sin visa
programme.desc: Una divertida comedia de seis latinos que viajan a Estados Unidos y pronto se verán inmersos en las situaciones más ridículas y vergonzosas. Desde un estudiante de intercambio, a una ingenua actriz, cada uno vivirá peripecias inesperadas.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II

programme.title: Back Arrow
programme.desc: In a world fueled by one's conviction, one man falls from the sky. He claims to come from beyond the wall, though the world as we know it only exists inside.

programme.title: Back Arrow
programme.desc: The strange happenings at Edger Village are starting to be heard across the world; Arrow leaves to head for the wall.

programme.title: Back Arrow
programme.desc: Elsha discovers a hidden power, and the village is ruined for good; to protect everyone and find a new home, a sacrifice must be made.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Post preparó un baño para su esposa antes de salir a correr. Regresó y la encontró sin respirar. Murió antes de que llegara la ambulancia. La policía consideró su muerte como accidental hasta que surgió un motivo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la escena de un asesinato horrible, el asesino se esforzó mucho para poder borrar sus huellas dactilares y oscurecer las huellas de zapatos que dejó cuando arrastraba los rastros de sangre en el piso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Genes delatores
programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Usando técnicas que vio en programas de televisión de ciencia forense, una madre determina quién fue el responsable del accidente que hirió permanentemente a su hija de 4 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino cereal
programme.desc: Cuando un incendio destruyó la mayor parte de una casa y un niño desapareció, la policía organizó la búsqueda más grande en la historia de su pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de dispararle a sus víctimas en la cabeza, el asesino limpió la escena, colocó la evidencia incriminatoria en una bolsa de plástico y la arrojó al río.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.desc: Now down to 15 men, New York invites the guys to a pond where they must prove their love by swimming to her and presenting her with a gift.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While Amanda Bentley visits Martin, a good friend, and benefactor of a visiting Communist Chinese dance troupe, Tako, the star dancer drops dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: High-power and high-profile defense attorney, Roger Calendar, is brought into the emergency room with a near-fatal stabbing wound.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As Lt. Steve Sloan and his partner, Cheryl, pick up their favorite strawberry milkshakes, Steve is distracted by a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Calvin Laird, Mark and Steve's neighbor, threatens his girlfriend violently when she challenges his mean behavior. His repeated playing of loud music bothers the Sloans to no end.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A film school buddy of Alex's is at Community General Hospital making a documentary about the legend of a ghost in the basement.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run patient mysteriously dies in the hospital, Dr. Sloan and his interns, Jack and Amanda, put their amateur crime solving abilities to the test.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mobster's gun moll fakes her way past hospital security guards, and Dr. Sloan almost becomes her next victim! Attractive and smart, no one suspected Amy Westin's true identity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Tonight, of all nights, Murphy's Law is definitely operating at its worst! After finally finagling all the details to put together a money-raising telethon for the hospital, Dr. Sloan loses his cool when the host of the show is murdered - on the air!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A late night call for help sends Dr. Sloan racing to the rescue! Ninety-two-year-old millionaire Jonathan Nash fears for his life.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A supposed 'ticket to heaven' leads to a trail of greedy scam artists and gamblers! Dying of a gunshot wounds, a man gives Dr. Sloan a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A box of mutilated flowers and slashed photos drives pop-singer Shanda into a state of shock. After she collapses and her road tour grinds to a halt, Dr. Mark Sloan takes pity on Shanda and embarks on a search to find her mysterious stalker.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Still groggy from a visit to the dentist, Dr. Sloan is mystified when a noted fund-raiser dies while visiting his home. Adding to the confusion, the body mysteriously disappears before the police get there!

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to 'own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of 'Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Scientists investigate the meteorite impact responsible for the extinction of dinosaurs. According to a theory, the event was triggered by a comet hitting the present-day Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: The Mystery of Rome's X Tomb
programme.desc: Dr Michael Scott investigates the secrets of a tomb containing over 2,000 bodies in one of the catacombs of Rome.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough shows us how ancient creatures have come to be preserved as fossils and how those fossils can shed light on characteristics of these creatures' lives, and even their death.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.desc: A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German Shepherd who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.

programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.desc: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.

programme.desc: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chihuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt, Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his teeth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. The second fugitive, Jade, who turns out to be a tough catch, despite help from Jade's sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Cloud Dancing and the rest of the Cheyenne are told to move to a reservation where they would be dependent on handouts. Dr. Mike, Sully, and the children head to Washington to lodge a complaint and get the order changed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Arriving in Washington, Dr. Mike and Sully find it difficult to find anyone to listen to their concerns. Sully is arrested for army desertion, while a plot against the president is overheard. Michaela must break Sully out of jail to expose the conspiracy.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When money becomes short for Sully, he tries everything to make ends meet rather than accept help from Dr. Mike.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully are traveling through dangerous Indian country when their stagecoach is robbed, and they are abandoned.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike discovers a lump in Dorothy's breast and tries to convince her to have surgery. Hank tries Ladies Night at the saloon, and Jake and Loren have a plan to get free drinks. Colleen deals with hurtful boyish pranks from classmates.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike has a hard time accepting Dorothy's decision not to have the surgery that will save her life. Jake tries to escape the two men who kidnapped him.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town's Christmas spirit is in question when a family who are Jewish immigrants moves to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully is appointed Indian agent to the Cheyenne and approaches it in an idealistic fashion. When the food intended for the tribe is diverted and illegal alcohol is plentiful, Sully becomes angry.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A newspaper report of a comet's imminent collision with Earth causes hysteria in town over the end of the world.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sam Lindsay, an older independent woman, decides to end her medical treatment and take off into the wilderness.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian's biological father Ethan returns to town with a new wife, intending to take the children away from Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian run away to keep their father from taking them away from Dr. Mike and Sully. After they are found, it's discovered Colleen has developed pneumonia. Dr. Mike realizes she has to let them go to save them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town puts on a production of Romeo and Juliet. Brian tries to learn what love is so he can write a paper for school.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike convinces Robert E to take a job fixing a train boiler, then finds out it is a dangerous job.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's first wife Alexis testifies that Blake is capable of violence; Matthew takes off with Lindsay; Alexis tells Steven of her love for him; the jury announces they have reached a verdict.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is found guilty; Krystle reunites with her husband; Blake strikes Steven; a pregnant Krystle suffers a fall; Alexis moves onto the Carrington estate.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle orders Alexis from the mansion; Blake instructs his attorney to cut Steven out of his will; Claudia attempts suicide; Alexis tells Steven that he is Blake's only child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis tells Cecil Colby that Fallon is his daughter; Blake and Steven are urged to reconcile; Dr. Toscanni pulls an unconscious Steven from the pool and rushes him to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven returns to the mansion to recover from injuries sustained by his fall; Krystle's niece, Sammy Jo, arrives to spend a few weeks with the Carrigtons; Alexis hires a private investigator to delve into Krystle's past.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick reveals to his sister that Blake is responsible for the death of their younger brother; Sammy Jo and Steven spend the night together; Alexis shoots at Krystle's horse, causing her to be thrown to the ground and hospitalized.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle loses her baby; Steven and Sammy Jo begin dating, although Steven is in love with Claudia. Fallon continues her affair with Nick, and is jealous to find him visiting Krystle in the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon learns she is pregnant and tells Jeff she is having an abortion; he agrees to divorce her but only if she bears the child. Krystle remains despondent over the loss of her baby; Claudia takes a job with Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis tricks Blake into coming to Rome and further traps him by hiring a gossip photographer to snap suggestive photos of the two; Jeff begs Fallon to cancel her abortion; as Nick confronts Krystle, his consolation gives way to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the paparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick persuades Krystle to leave Blake; Steven and Sammy Jo announce they are married; Blake is attacked by gangsters and blinded when his car is bombed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake remains blinded following the explosion; Nick asks Krystle to divorce her husband and marry him; Blake investigates Nick's past; Alexis is determined to drive Krystle from Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon confesses her love to Nick, but he is interested in Krystle; Blake's attempts to bring gangster Logan Rhinewood before a Crime Committee hearing are thwarted; Sammy Jo tells Alexis she knows her secret; Blake receives an anonymous letter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1985, Julie Estes was kidnapped from the Southside convenience store where she worked. Her body was found the next day, but the killing went unsolved until 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a discarded sleeping bag containing bloody sneakers and a purse, which eventually leads to the body of a young woman. A mark found on the victim's body enables police to track the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, a human skull retrieved from an Ohio pond reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate that the victim had been stabbed multiple times and that the teeth had been removed with needle-nose pliers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Orphans of Gettysburg
programme.desc: On this premiere episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gettysburg to look into strange phenomena that connects civil war orphans with 3 locations and the 150thanniversary of the Battle of Gettysburg.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Phantom Fleet
programme.desc: Mayday! On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Buffalo, New York to investigate paranormal activity occurring on three former service vessels moored at the Buffalo Naval and Military Park.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Don’t Forget About Us
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Franklin, Kentucky to investigate Octagon Hallwhere secret tunnels have been found under the house, which are believed to have hidden confederate soldiersduring the civil war.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Family Plot
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lucas, Ohio for two cases. The first stop, to look into phenomena connected to a gruesome event, The Ceely Rose Murders.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dead Presidents
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to King George, Virginia to become the first paranormal team to investigate Belle Grove Plantation.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Nine Men's Misery
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Cumberland Library & Monastery in Cumberland, Rhode Island where \\"the practice of silence\\" has been disturbed by a brutal past.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: An Officer and an Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS and 2 special guests investigate the Brunswick Old City Hall where an officer was shot and killedin the 1890's. Will TAPS discover that he's still on duty?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Textbook Case
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to an abandoned school in Barnegat, New Jersey. Could the apparition of a beloved community teacher be luring children inside the building or are other spirits at play?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: 200th Episode: Grant is Back
programme.desc: On this 2 hour special, TAPS celebrates their 200th episode by re-visiting one of their favorite and most haunted locations, Trans-Allegheny Lunatic Asylum and by calling on old friends, Grant, Dustin and Joe.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Phantoms of the Opera
programme.desc: On this special Halloween episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Ohio to investigate the Cincinnati Music Hall, a buildingwhere the hauntingsare as frequent as the performances.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Barrels of Boos
programme.desc: For Season 10's premiere episode, TAPS is heading back out on the American Whiskey Trail to investigate the Wild Turkey Distillery in Kentucky. It's believed that the spirits of founding family members are behind the activity there!

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Too Many Apparitions in the Kitchen
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the Culinary Institute of America in Hyde Park, New Yorkcalls in TAPS to find out if the spirits of Jesuit priests still roam the areas where they once lived, worked and were buried when it was a seminary.

programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.
